title: Nem Nuong Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Vietnamese and Mexican flavors, Nem Nuong Tacos are a flavorful twist on traditional street food.

ingredients.name: Nem Nuong Sausages
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian markets or online

ingredients.name: Tortillas
ingredients.notes: Corn tortillas work best for this recipe

instructions: 1. Grill or pan-fry Nem Nuong Sausages until cooked through.
2. Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
3. Assemble tacos with cooked sausages, shredded vegetables, cilantro, and a dollop of sriracha mayo.
4. Drizzle cilantro-lime sauce over the top of each taco.
5. Serve with lime wedges on the side.
